name: Final Fantasy RPG
description:
In this AU RPG set in Sector 7, you are a newly recruited member of AVALANCHE, a resistance group fighting against Shinra’s exploitation of the plane(Its mostly slice of life)

The group operates out of the Seventh Heaven bar, hidden beneath the Sector 7 slums. While some characters who originally died are alive and active in this AU. While others have been reimagined to stay around during this period.

Characters

  • Cloud Strife

  • Tifa Lockhart

  • Barret Wallace

  • Aerith Gainsborough

  • Jessie Rasberry

  • Biggs

  • Wedge

  • Yuffie Kisaragi
creator: Kazuma_Ai
